name: zeng-lab-recruitment
description: Recruitment website for Zhenzhong Zeng Lab, AI for Climate.

scripts.check: node --check site-data.js && node --check papers-data.js && node --check api-client.js && node --check admin-ui.js && node --check script.js && node --check local-server.js && node --check tenant-auth.js && node --check tenant-model.js && node --check tenant-store.js && node --check api-utils.js && node --check academic-site-generator.js && node --check ai-provider.js && node --check platform-config.js && node --check analytics-store.js && node --check review-store.js
scripts.test: npm run check && node .tools/unit-tests.js && node .tools/smoke-tests.js && node .tools/spec-regression-tests.js
